mocks.description: Stub watercolor generator standing in for the real @ink/visuals git dependency. Lives entirely inside app/src/themes/treatments/dynamicVisuals.ts's 'STUB IMPLEMENTATION SEAM' block: an internal randomizeParams()-equivalent (fresh Math.random()-derived blob geometry per call, no seed) plus a placeholder-SVG builder whose colour values are derived exclusively from the pinned StyleToken fields. Returns a valid, self-contained SVG that varies per call (AC-UX-1) while honoring the pinned style identity.
mocks.interface_mocked: DYNAMIC_GENERATORS.watercolor(style, kind, render?) => string, as it will be satisfied by @ink/visuals's renderSVG API in Phase B
mocks.resolution_story: S7 (Phase B, blocked on ink's v0 git tag)
